title: Epsilon-Nine
description: Modpack for the Epsilon-Nine community server.
body:
# This is Epsilon-Nine. 
This modpack is for the Epsilon-Nine multiplayer server. A small community server.

It currently takes Origins, Mana and Artifice, Create, Mekanism, and Farmer's Delight, throws them in a blender, and creates a concoction that has been described as "entertaining," "fun," "weird," and "vaugely citrus flavored".

Should you play this pack? Honestly, no idea. But if half-brained tomfoolery is right up your alley, then I think you might be right at home. 

Certain versions of the pack contain the "Quark Programmer Art" Resourcepack, which is property of the [Quark project](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Quark) and Violet Moon Mods.
<details>
<summary>Modlist</summary>

```
Last updated 2024-05-12 17:17 Z
```
